notableEvents.label: Fielding error

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Tovar reached on error

notableEvents.label: Sterlin Thompson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sterlin Thompson grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to shortstop Mookie Betts to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Ezequiel Tovar out at 2nd. Sterlin Thompson out at 1st.
